Name: Patologi, Aarhus Universitetshospital
Description:
Patologi er et stort og avanceret laboratorium med automatiseret teknologi og anvender et bredt panel af diagnostiske metoder på celle- og vævsprøver fra patienterne.

På årsbasis modtager vi mere end 60.000 rekvisitioner, mikroskoperer over 500.000 glas og udfører ca. 3500 molekylære analyser. Meget af vores diagnostik omfatter udredning for og behandling af kræft, herudover relaterer en del af vores diagnostik sig til transplantationer og medicinske sygdomme.

Vi beskæftiger os i den daglige drift med:

- Cytologi
- Diagnostisk molekylær patologi
- Histologi
- Obduktion

Name: Hospital Santa Joana Recife
Description: O Hospital Santa Joana Recife é reconhecido como um dos complexos hospitalares mais importantes do país, destacando-se em diversas especialidades médicas. Desde a sua fundação, o hospital tem por essência a promoção de melhorias que garantam a qualidade e segurança assistencial, através do constante investimento em equipes, tecnologia, melhoria dos processos administrativos/operacionais e na sua infraestrutura para que seja colocado à disposição dos seus clientes o que há de melhor e mais moderno.

Name: Ayurgreen Hospitals
Description: Ayurgreen is an NABH Accredited Hospital and one of the most contemporary relevant hospitals in Kerala; Ayurgreen built on our unique four pillars of therapy, fitness, aesthetics and active-ageing provides quality healthcare solutions to suit patient needs. It places special emphasis on the use of Modern Technologies including robotics, complementary therapies and the sense of touch to pamper the body, mind and soul. The market leader with experienced and qualified healthcare practitioners, therapists and staff you can rely on, Ayurgreen provides the best Integrated health solutions in ORTHO –NEURO Rehabilitation, lifestyle and awareness programs and has been pioneers in delivering quality health and wellness programs, since 2000 to patients from 54 Nations.

Name: Klinikum Würzburg Mitte gGmbH
Description:
In 13 Fachkliniken und zwei Fachabteilungen versorgen unsere mehr als 2.400 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter des KWM jährlich etwa 30.000 stationäre Patientinnen und Patienten.

An drei Standorten in Würzburg bildet zudem das Medizinische Versorgungszentrum des KWM die Schnittstelle zwischen ambulanter und stationärer Versorgung.

Zur Geschichte: Zum 1. Januar 2017 schlossen sich die beiden Würzburger Krankenhäuser Missioklinik und Juliusspital unter dem Dach der Klinikum Würzburg Mitte gGmbH zusammen.

Die drei Träger-Gesellschaften des KWM sind die Stiftung Juliusspital Würzburg, der Verein für ärztlichen Dienst in Übersee – Missionsärztliches Institut Würzburg und der Verein Kinderklinik am Mönchberg e.V.

Impressum: https://www.kwm-klinikum.de/impressum.html

Name: Hospital HM Gálvez
Description:
HM Hospitales es el grupo hospitalario privado de referencia a nivel nacional que basa su oferta en la excelencia asistencial sumada a la investigación, la docencia, la constante innovación tecnológica y la publicación de resultados.

Nuestro grupo está formado por 49 centros asistenciales: 20 hospitales, 3 centros integrales de alta especialización en Oncología, Cardiología, Neurociencias; 3 centros especializados en Medicina Reproductiva, Salud Bucodental y Oftalmológica, además de 23 policlínicos. Todos ellos trabajan de manera coordinada para ofrecer una gestión integral de las necesidades y requerimientos de sus pacientes.

Name: Bharti Eye Hospital
Description: Bharti Eye Hospital, established in 1985, focuses on providing the latest technology and facilities for eye procedures and treatments. Dr. S. Bharti, the Medical Director, and Dr.Bhupesh Singh (Director Bharti Eye Hospital ) has pioneered many medical procedures and uses the most recent technological equipment. The hospital aims to provide world-class facilities at lower costs, offering advanced surgical procedures and diagnostic facilities, including cataract surgery techniques, laser vision correction, glaucoma treatment, and oculoplasty. The hospital has a team of over 120 dedicated and competent eye care professionals who provide treatments tailored to each patient's needs, resulting in over 10 lakh satisfied patients over the past three decades. Bharti Eye Hospital prioritizes patient safety and wellness, aims for continuous progress in medical technologies, and conforms to international standards. They also contribute to society by promoting eye donation, eye banking, education, and preventive care.

Name: Unisana Hospitais
Description:
A Unisana Hospitais é um grupo de cuidados de saúde em Portugal, dedicado a oferecer acompanhamento de excelência com um olhar próximo e personalizado. Dispomos de unidades em Almada, Lisboa, Porto, Santarém e Torres Vedras, e estamos a consolidar-nos como uma rede nacional com forte presença local. Colaboramos lado a lado com os setores público, segurador e social, para garantir que cuidados de saúde chegam a cada vez mais pessoas.

Disponibilizamos desde consultas a intervenções cirúrgicas, sempre com foco na qualidade, proximidade e confiança. Com equipas multidisciplinares altamente qualificadas e com tecnologia de última geração, trabalhamos todos os dias para garantir diagnósticos rigorosos, tratamentos eficazes e uma experiência de cuidado verdadeiramente centrada no paciente.

Estabelecimentos prestadores de cuidados de saúde, registados e licenciados pela ERS – Entidade Reguladora da Saúde. Em cumprimento das normas aplicáveis, disponibilizamos no nosso site os dados referentes a cada estabelecimento: nome, morada, registo e licença ERS, nome da sociedade e NIPC.

Name: Centre de la mémoire des HUG
Description: Le Centre de la mémoire des Hôpitaux universitaires de Genève (HUG) est un centre spécialisé dans le diagnostic, le traitement et le suivi des troubles de la mémoire et des maladies neurodégénératives comme la maladie d'Alzheimer.

Name: Hospital Beatriz Ramos
Description:
O Hospital Beatriz Ramos é um hospital filantrópico, sem fins lucrativos, situado em Indaial/SC. Atualmente o HBR é o único Hospital da cidade, atendendo pacientes de Indaial e de toda a região.

Construído ao longo da década de 1940 e inaugurado em 1951, o Hospital Beatriz Ramos foi construído com apoio de empresários e comunidade local.

Em 18 de março de 2019, através do Decreto Municipal nº 967, a Prefeitura de Indaial decretou intervenção do Hospital Beatriz Ramos. Desde então a administração municipal tem trabalhado para revitalizar a estrutura hospitalar e torná-lo referência na região.

Name: Noble Hospital Kundli
Description: Welcome to Noble Multispeciality Hospital, where your health and well-being are our top priorities. At Noble, we take pride in offering a wide range of high-quality medical services across various specialities, ensuring comprehensive care for patients of all ages. Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with advanced technology and staffed by a team of highly skilled and compassionate healthcare professionals dedicated to providing exceptional care.

FY Business Medical company has become a sought-after company in the medical sector thanks to its work with hospitals and the services it has provided to medical companies. Thanks to the disposable products, radiation protective lead products, medical gas systems products and medical paper products contained in its structure, it has become a solution partner to numerous organizations and continues its services.

Name: NIO Super Speciality Eye Care
Description:
The National Institute of Ophthalmology (NIO) is one of the most prestigious and trusted super specialty eye hospitals in Pune. It has two state-of-the-art facilities located in Shivaji Nagar and Aundh (launched in 2016), with a combined capacity of 26 beds. The hospital provides specialized care across a variety of ophthalmic departments.

NIO is led by the erstwhile Medical Director Dr. Aditya Kelkar, with a dedicated team of 130+ highly trained personnel. It employs some of the most well-known and leading experts in ophthalmology, bringing vast skill and experience to serve the diverse needs of patients. This has earned the hospital a reputation for clinical excellence in treating complex eye diseases and made it the first NABH and JCI-accredited eye hospital in Pune.

Founded by Dr. Shreekant Kelkar and Mrs. Aruna Kelkar, NIO was established in 1992 to create a world-class center of excellence in eye care. The hospital combines state-of-the-art technology with expert personnel to provide exceptional services. Today, it includes subspecialty clinics, integrated diagnostic, imaging and laser systems, modern operation theatres, daycare recovery suites, and advanced training and education facilities.

NIO serves patients from Pune and across Maharashtra for a wide range of eye disorders, including Cornea, Retina, Pediatric Ophthalmology, Neuro Ophthalmology, and Oculoplasty. It screens more than 75,000 outpatients and performs nearly 6,000 surgeries annually.

Key services include:

OPD Consultation, Cataract & Refractive Surgeries

Excimer Laser, Vitreo Retinal, Diabetic Eye Clinic

Pediatric, Neuro, Cornea & External Eye Disease

Oculoplasty, Immunology, Eye Bank, Lasik (Contoura, Silk, Femtolaser)

Artevo 800 3D, Capsulaser, and Femtolaser-assisted Cataract Surgery

NIO aims to expand accessibility to world-class eye care through innovation, research, and education.

Name: Goodace Hospital
Description: At Goodace Hospital, with state-of-the-art facilities and a team of highly skilled medical professionals, we strive to deliver compassionate and personalised care to each individual who walks through our doors. Mission: Our mission is to enhance the health and well-being of the communities we serve by delivering accessible, high-quality medical services with compassion, integrity, and innovation. We aim to be the leading healthcare institution, known for our commitment to patient-centered care and excellence in medical outcomes. Vision: Our vision is to create a healthier world where every individual has access to comprehensive healthcare services. We envision Goodace Hospital as a centre of excellence, renowned for its medical expertise, advanced technology, and patient-centric approach. We aspire to be the preferred choice for individuals seeking healthcare solutions, surpassing expectations and setting new standards in the industry.

Name: LILAVATI FOUNDATION
Description:
Mr. Kishor Mehta and Mrs. Charu Mehta being son and daughter-in-law of Mr. Kirtilal Manilal Mehta are instrumental in setting up the multispecialty tertiary care Lilavati Hospital, Mumbai. The Founder/ Permanent Trustee Mr. Kishor Mehta & Mrs. Charu Mehta having knowledge and experience of managing a hospital are ambitious to set up a world class multispecialty hospital in name of “Lilavati Foundation” in Gujarat along with their sons Mr. Prashant Mehta & Mr. Rajesh Mehta. Lilavati Foundation is to be set up in their personal capacity at Gift City, Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

The vision of the hospital is to provide tertiary and quaternary care services. The entity proposes to set up a 300-bed hospital consisting of 250 census beds & 50 non-census beds at Plot 47A in the Block 47, in GIFT City, Gandhi Nagar, Gujarat.

Name: São Bernardo Apart Hospital Colatina
Description:
A humanização esta presente em todos os cantos do São Bernardo Apart Hospital. Sua estrutura foi pensada para oferecer conforto e comodidade, buscando tornar a estadia dos pacientes e familiares a mais agradável possível.

Para que isso fosse possível, foi implantando no Apart Hospital o conceito de hotelaria hospitalar, com integração de serviço de qualidade, instalações modernas e proporcionar bem-estar.

Name: First Neuro Hospitals
Description:
Welcome to First Neuro Hospitals (FNH) – India's first and only neurosciences chain dedicated to providing cutting-edge care and comprehensive solutions for all neurological disorders.

At FNH, we redefine neurology and neurosurgery by offering a spectrum of subspecialties tailored to address diverse neurological conditions. Our multidisciplinary approach encompasses neurology, neurosurgery, paediatric neurology, interventional neuroradiology, neuro-physiatry, neuropathology, and neuro-intensive care. This comprehensive range ensures that every patient receives personalized treatment and attention, fostering optimal outcomes and improved quality of life.

Accredited as an advanced stroke centre, FNH sets the benchmark for stroke care in India. Our unwavering commitment to specialized care for stroke patients has earned us the distinction of being the 12th hospital in India to achieve this prestigious accreditation.

With units strategically located in Mangalore and Kerala, FNH extends its reach and impact, serving communities with unparalleled expertise and compassion. Our state-of-the-art facilities, coupled with a team of highly skilled professionals, we continue to redefine neuro-care, one patient at a time. Join us on our journey as we strive to make high quality neuro-care a fundamental right for every individual.

Name: Aarka Hospitals
Description:
Our hospitals have state-of-the-art facilities that combine advanced technology with modern treatment methods, allowing you to feel safe in your decision making process. Our staff members are highly trained professionals who are dedicated to providing exceptional patient care using the latest techniques available.

We are committed to providing holistic treatment options for every patient. Our team of specialists is dedicated to helping you achieve your highest level of health, both physically and mentally.

Name: Neurokirurgisk Afdeling U, OUH
Description:
På neurokirurgisk afdeling U Odense Universitetshospital, vil vi være progressive og innovative. Vores fokus er høj faglighed og at være første med den nyeste behandling samt implementere vores forskning i det kliniske arbejde.
Vi er omkring 150 ansatte på afdelingen, der spænder bredt fra terapeuter, sekretærer sygeplejersker, læger og mange flere. Styrken er vores tværfaglighed og iver efter at gøre det bedste, og så gøre det endnu bedre.  Alle på afdelingen bidrager til målet, og vores arbejdsstemning er uformel men professionel, og den omgangsform skal give tryghed for patienten. Vi arbejder også aktivt med inddragelse af pårørende herunder i forskning sammenhæng.
Følg afd. U på LinkedIn for nyheder fra afdelingen, både til dig som patient og til dig som ønsker at blive en del af holdet.

Name: CERHValencia
Description:
Nuestro centro de Reproducción Humana fue creado con una arquitectura moderna, innovadora y pensada en transmitir un ambiente cálido, íntimo y agradable a nuestras pacientes. Arquitectura y diseño van a la mano en los aproximadamente 2.500 metros cuadrados de nuestra clínica.

Como centro de fertilidad líder en la región deseamos que su tratamiento de fertilidad sea lo mas amigable, y efectivo posible. Con la ayuda de todo nuestro personal altamente calificado, les orientaremos en cada uno de los pasos a seguir durante su tratamiento.

- El 80% de nuestros pacientes logran su embarazo.
- Centro de fertilidad líder en la región.
- Todo nuestro personal está altamente calificado.

Ponemos nuestra experiencia y servicios especializados a su disposición para ayudarles en su tan anhelado sueño de ser padres. Gracias a nuestros equipos de última tecnología podemos obtener embriones de altísima calidad con lo cual nuestras tasas de embarazo son las más altas del país.

Name: Noordwest Academie
Description:
Noordwest Academie: leren en onderzoeken voor de zorg van morgen

De Noordwest Academie biedt opleidingen en research aan in de klinische praktijk. Ons onderwijs is flexibel, eigentijds en interprofessioneel, met de praktijk als leeromgeving. Met oog voor ieders talent en gedrevenheid bereiden we medewerkers voor op de toekomst. We spelen in op nieuwe technologieën, wetenschappelijke inzichten en maatschappelijke veranderingen. Ons onderwijs is praktijkgericht, met ruimte voor verdieping, innovatie en groei.

Onze focus ligt op verpleegkundige en medische opleidingen, blended learning, training & expertise en praktijkgericht onderzoek. Studenten en zorgprofessionals leren samen, begeleid door ervaren experts en met toegang tot ons skillslab.

Samen met onze partners in Noord-Holland bouwen we aan een toekomstbestendige zorg, waar leren en onderzoeken hand in hand gaan.

Onderdeel van Noordwest Ziekenhuisgroep

Name: KRES Medical sp. z o.o.
Description:
Od 5 lat nasza firma specjalizuje się w dystrybucji wysokiej jakości urządzeń USG marki Focus&Fusion. Działamy nie tylko na rynku polskim, lecz także na terenie Czech. Jako zaufany partner zapewniamy klientom pełną gamę produktów USG. Co więcej, oferujemy wyjątkową 5-letnią gwarancję na wszystkie nasze urządzenia USG, co potwierdza nasze zaangażowanie w satysfakcję klienta.

Nasz zakres działalności to nie tylko sprzedaż - zajmujemy się również przeglądami i serwisem urządzeń USG wszystkich marek. Nasz doświadczony zespół specjalistów jest gotowy zapewnić kompleksową obsługę, gwarantując sprawne działanie i niezawodność sprzętu. Dzięki naszemu zaangażowaniu w jakość i profesjonalizm, jesteśmy liderem w branży. Współpracując z nami, otrzymują Państwo nie tylko produkty najwyższej jakości, lecz także kompleksową opiekę serwisową.

Dołącz do grona naszych zadowolonych klientów i zaufaj ekspertom w dziedzinie USG. Jesteśmy tutaj, by sprostać Państwa oczekiwaniom i zapewnić rozwiązania dopasowane do indywidualnych potrzeb.

Name: Rijnstate Oncologisch Centrum
Description:
Bij Rijnstate Oncologisch Centrum zetten wij ons dagelijks in voor de best mogelijke zorg voor mensen met kanker. Onze ervaren, multidisciplinaire teams werken nauw samen om persoonlijke behandelplannen op maat te maken. Zo zorgen we ervoor dat elke patiënt de zorg krijgt die past bij zijn of haar situatie.
Naast standaard diagnostiek en behandelingen bieden wij ook een aantal topklinische behandelingen die slechts in enkele ziekenhuizen in Nederland beschikbaar is.
Bij Rijnstate staat goed georganiseerde, kwalitatief hoogwaardige patiëntenzorg centraal, waarbij medische expertise hand in hand gaat met brede ondersteuning door maatschappelijk werkers, psychologen en andere specialisten. Samen staan we klaar om onze patiënten niet alleen medisch, maar ook mentaal en emotioneel te ondersteunen tijdens een intensieve periode.

Name: Mega Medical Complex
Description:
At Mega Medical Complex, we are committed to delivering world-class healthcare through cutting-edge medical treatments, state-of-the-art facilities, and compassionate patient care. Our multidisciplinary team of expert physicians, specialists, and healthcare professionals work tirelessly to ensure the highest standard of care for every individual.

By following us, you'll receive regular updates on the latest medical advancements, groundbreaking treatments, and wellness insights designed to help you lead a healthier life. Explore inspiring patient stories, behind-the-scenes looks at our dedicated team, and valuable health tips that can make a real difference in your well-being.

At Mega Medical Complex, we don’t just treat patients; we partner with you on your journey to wellness and recovery. Stay connected with us to learn more about our initiatives, upcoming events, and our ongoing efforts to build a healthier future for all. Together, we can shape a community where health and care come first.

Name: European Ovary Workshop
Description:
The European Ovary Workshop (EOW) aims to address global fertility challenges by bringing together researchers and clinicians in female reproduction. We will focus on ovarian biology, cryopreservation, environmental impacts, fertility preservation, endocrinology and ageing. Through knowledge exchange and networking, EOW seeks to foster innovative solutions and support the next generation of scientists. 

At the European Ovary Workshop, attendees can anticipate a lineup of speakers renowned for their expertise and groundbreaking contributions to the field of ovary science. 

EOW takes pride in offering attendees a unique opportunity to learn from the best and forge connections with leaders thus shaping the future of ovarian biology, fertility treatments and woman’s health.

Name: HOSP TRADE

Name: CTCPR  - Center for Translational Cardiology and Pragmatic Randomized Trials
Description:
CTCPR is a collaboration between the Department of Heart Disease, Herlev and Gentofte Hospital and the Department of Biomedical Sciences (BMI), University of Copenhagen. We conduct research into the causes of heart disease in order to prevent heart disease from occurring. The research center includes Cardiovascular Non-Invasive Imaging Research Laboratory (CIRL).

The center is founded by Dr. Tor Biering-Sørensen. Together with his research group at CTCPR and CIRL which consists of more than 50 affiliated researchers, Dr. Biering-Sørensen conducts extensive investigations into the efficacy of cardiovascular imaging techniques to enhance individualized risk prediction. Moreover, he has initiated several large-scale pragmatic randomized trials utilizing the resources of the nationwide Danish registries, thereby contributing significantly to the advancement of pragmatic trial methodologies.

Name: Santa Casa de Misericórdia - Itapeva/SP
Description:
A Santa Casa de Itapeva é uma instituição privada, sem fins lucrativos, reconhecida como de utilidade pública, vem executando os procedimentos de saúde, particularmente em se tratando dos serviços destinados aos pacientes do SUS.

É uma Instituição que vem realizando procedimentos de média e alta complexidade à região Sudoeste do Estado de São Paulo, possui 172 leitos, sendo 127 destinados ao SUS e atende em média 230 mil pacientes por ano, sendo assim com o perfil assistencial nas seguintes especialidades: Clínica Médica, Ginecologia/Obstetrícia, Pediatria, Ortopedia, Neurocirurgia, Nefrologia,  Anestesiologia, Oncologia, Cirurgia Geral e Radioterapia. 

A Instituição tem como missão proporcionar a seus clientes e a comunidade, ações de saúde com qualidade e responsabilidade social, assegurando o desenvolvimento profissional de seus colaboradores. No final do século XIX, mais precisamente no ano de 1896, alguns cidadãos faxinenses entre eles Dona Luiza Marcondes e seu marido Francisco Marcondes Rezende resolveram fundar uma Santa Casa de Misericórdia em Faxina, antiga denominação da cidade de Itapeva. Três anos mais tarde, no dia 20 de maio de 1899 foi redigida a Ata para a fundação da Santa Casa de Misericórdia de Faxina. Somente no dia 10 de junho de 1899 foi escolhida a primeira diretoria que nomeou como o 1º Provedor o Cel. Crescêncio Ferreira de Melo, um dos fundadores da Instituição.

Name: Health Concierge Inc.
Description:
Health Concierge automates and streamlines the complex patient discharge process - saving hospitals millions of dollars each year and dramatically improving the patient experience.

Hospitals today face severe logistical bottlenecks due to manually-run administrative tasks. Inefficiencies in patient discharge cascade downstream into an array of healthcare problems, including staff overtime, distressed patients, and ER boarding - ultimately causing tremendous and often overlooked financial losses. 

Our solution leverages advanced AI and automation to handle discharge-related administrative tasks rapidly while improving patient choices. We significantly reduce overhead, shorten patient delays, and seamlessly coordinate transitions to post-acute care. By combining pioneering technology in large language models and AI-driven workflows with deep healthcare domain expertise, we deliver solutions that previously seemed impossible. 

Our mission is to harness AI for positive, real-world impact: Improving hospital budgets, empowering healthcare providers, and enhancing the lives of patients nationwide.

Name: Spitali Kestrina
Description:
Spitali “Kestrina” është një qendër e specializuar që ofron shërbime të shkëlqyera në fushën e gjinekologjisë, obstetrikës dhe kirurgjisë së përgjithshme. Spitali ynë ofron një strukturë moderne dhe të avancuar për të përmbushur nevojat e pacientëve tanë në një mënyrë më të plotë dhe të sofistikuar.

Spitali Kestrina ofron një gamë të gjerë shërbimesh për shëndetin e gruas, fëmijës dhe gjithashtu për trajtimin e problemeve kirurgjikale, duke përfshirë:
Shërbime Gjinekologjike dhe Obstetrike: Disa nga shërbimet gjinekologjike dhe obstetrike që spitali ynë ofron janë: ekografi, trajtimi i infeksioneve gjinekologjike, përcjellja e shtatzënive normale dhe të rrezikuara, marrja e pap-testit, prerja cezariane, trajtimi i tumoreve të organeve gjenitale dhe korrigjimi i anomalive të mitrës.

Shërbime Kirurgjikale: Disa nga shumë shërbime kirurgjikale që spitali ynë ofron janë: operacione abdominale, kirurgji të organeve të brendshme, trajtimi i tumoreve, procedura të emergjencës dhe kirurgji minimalisht invazive. 

Në spitalin tonë, kemi investuar në pajisje dhe teknologji të fundit për të siguruar diagnostikimin dhe trajtimin më të avancuar për pacientët tanë. Strukturat tona përfshijnë sallën e lindjes, sallën e operacionit të pajisur me teknologjinë më të fundit, kujdesin intensiv për pacientët e operuar dhe të porsalindurit, si dhe një laborator të pajisur për analiza të avancuara.

Stafi ynë përbëhet nga profesionistë të kualifikuar dhe të përkushtuar, të cilët ofrojnë shërbime mjekësore të specializuara dhe të nivelit më të lartë. Ata janë në hap me arritjet më të fundit në mjekësi dhe përpiqen të ofrojnë zgjidhje të qëndrueshme dhe të personalizuara për çdo pacient.

Përveç shërbimeve gjinekologjike, obstetrike dhe kirurgjikale, ne ofrojmë gjithashtu shërbime specialistike në neonatologji dhe pediatri, duke përfshirë reanimimin e të porsalindurit, ekzaminime pediatrike dhe analizat laboratorike të nevojshme.

Name: Maxon Healthcare India Pvt Ltd
Description:
At Maxon Healthcare India Pvt. Ltd., we are dedicated to revolutionizing healthcare infrastructure with cutting-edge solutions tailored to the needs of modern medical facilities. Our expertise spans across Medical Gas Pipeline Systems, Modular Operation Theatres, CSSD, Pneumatic Tube Transport Systems (PTTS), and Hospital Integration, ensuring hospitals operate efficiently, safely, and with the highest standards of care.

Our Services
*Medical Gas Pipeline System (MGPS)
We specialize in the design, installation, and maintenance of medical gas pipeline systems, ensuring a safe, reliable, and uninterrupted supply of essential gases critical for patient care.

* Modular Operation Theatre (MOT)
Our advanced modular operation theatres are engineered to maintain sterile environments, enhance surgical precision, and comply with international healthcare standards. We integrate laminar airflow, HEPA filtration, antimicrobial surfaces, and hermetically sealed doors for optimal infection control.

*Central Sterile Supply Department (CSSD)
We provide end-to-end solutions for sterilization, decontamination, and reprocessing of medical instruments to ensure patient safety and infection prevention within healthcare facilities.

*Pneumatic Tube Transport System (PTTS)
Our automated material transport systems enable the rapid and secure movement of lab samples, blood products, documents, and medicines within hospitals, improving workflow efficiency and reducing response times in critical care situations.

*Hospital Integration & Automation
We offer smart hospital integration solutions that connect, automate, and optimize surgical equipment, patient monitoring, video recording, and lighting control, ensuring a streamlined and efficient healthcare environment.

Name: SCTIMST Clinical Engineering
Description:
Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences & Technology (SCTIMST), Trivandrum, is an Institution of National Importance established by an Act of Parliament in 1980. It is under the aegis of Department of Science and Technology, Government of India, with an Institute Body and a Governing Body constituted as per the provisions of the Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences & Technology, Trivandrum, Act, 1980. The Institute presents a unique model by connecting the different strands of Biomedical Technology ,Clinical Medicine (Cardiac and Neurosciences)and Public Health to produce a seamless continuum of indisputable relevance to society.

The human system has been deeply studied by medical people and a vast amount of knowledge has been accumulated. Studying the human system as an electromechanical system and related inter-disciplinary research have resulted in development of a new branch in engineering technology - the Biomedical Engineering. Biomedical Engineering (BME) is the application of engineering principles and techniques to the medical field. This branch incorporates study of the engineering aspects of human body as well as the study of sophisticated equipments used by the modern medical science. The discipline of biomedical engineering is the integrating medium for the two great dynamic professions; Medicine and Engineering. It combines the design and problem solving skills of engineering with medical and biological sciences to help improve patient healthcare and quality of life of individuals.

Clinical engineering is a subset of Biomedical engineering. It is a branch of biomedical engineering related to the operation of medical equipment in a hospital setting. Whereas, biomedical engineering is practiced primarily in academic institutions, research laboratories, and manufacturing setups clinical engineering is practiced in hospitals and other environments where medical device technologies are actually utilized. .

Name: Setu Newborn Care Centre
Description:
Welcome to Setu Newborn Care Centre

Setu Newborn Care Centre is Gujarat’s first tertiary neonatal unit, proudly meeting both National (NNF Level 3) and International (British Association of Perinatal Medicine) standards. Since its inception, Setu has been a pioneer in providing holistic and specialized care for vulnerable newborns, making it a beacon of hope for families across Gujarat, Rajasthan, and Madhya Pradesh.

Our monospeciality hospital focuses exclusively on neonatal care, handling even the most critical cases of premature and low birth weight infants (as low as 500 gm and 24 weeks gestation). Equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and led by a team of UK-trained Consultant Neonatologists with Certified Specialist Training in Neonatal Medicine, Setu delivers unparalleled care and expertise.

Key Features of Setu Newborn Care Centre:
State-of-the-Art NICU: Advanced ventilators, CPAP machines, Nitric Oxide therapy, multichannel monitors, and Cooling Machine for infants with Hypoxic Ischaemic Encephalopathy.
Specialized Team: Neonatologists trained in the UK and India, accredited by the Royal College of Paediatrics and Child Health, London.
Advanced Transport: Fully equipped ambulance, transport trolley with ventilator, and Babypod system for safe interhospital transfers.
Focus on Comfort: Kangaroo Mother Care, developmental aids, luxury rooms for mothers, breastfeeding facilities, and breast milk storage.
Dedicated Units: 25 intensive care NICU beds and 15 SCBU beds for special care.
At Setu, we blend advanced technology with compassionate care, ensuring the best outcomes for every newborn. With consistent success rates and heartwarming testimonials, we have established ourselves as the leading newborn care center in Gujarat.

Because every baby deserves a healthy start and a brighter future.

Name: Erich Wächter & Kollegen
Description:
POSITION, FEEL & TRAIN - Erich Wächter & Kollegen: Das sind Erich Wächter, Ralph Giesübel, Dieter Hund und Franziska Zwinge. Mit jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung als OP-Lagerungsspezialisten vermitteln wir im Team theoretische und praktische Fähigkeiten in puncto zeitsparende, effektive und vor allem sichere Patientenlagerung - vor, während und nach einer Operation. 

Was wir bieten: 
Haben Sie schon einmal darüber nachgedacht, in Ihrer OP-Abteilung / in Ihrem Fachzentrum für Weiterbildung / Ihrer Gesundheitsakademie eine Schulung zum Thema optimale Patientenpositionierung (unter realistischen Bedingungen) zu veranstalten?  

In unseren OP-Lagerungs-Workshops vermitteln wir nicht nur den Umgang mit den verschiedenen Positionierungshilfsmitteln, sondern gehen auf alle wichtigen Aspekte ein, wie: 
- die vollständige Informationssammlung für die Patientenlagerung (Vorerkrankungen?)
- Patientenpositionierung aus anästhesiologischer Sicht
- Bewegungslehre und Kinästhetik
- weitreichende Auswirkungen der Positionierung auf den Patienten über Myofasciallinien, Gelenken und anderen Strukturen 

Mit unseren Workshops stellen Sie sicher, dass die Qualität der Patientenpositionierung trotz zunehmendem Zeitdruck während und nach der Ausbildung stets den höchstmöglichen Standard erreicht bzw. beibehält.

Name: Khyber Eye Foundation
Description:
Khyber Eye Foundation's commitment to its cause is evident through its multiple registrations, including being recognized as a CHARITY ORGANIZATION by the Charitable Commission in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, the Health Care Commission, Directorate Social Welfare in Peshawar, and under the Societies Act XXI of 1860. Additionally, the foundation holds the esteemed NPO certification from the Pakistan Centre for Philanthropy [PCP] in Islamabad, a testament to its exceptional dedication in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.
Among the limited number of organizations in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa authenticated by the Pakistan Centre for Philanthropy, the Khyber Eye Foundation stands as a beacon of hope and change. Its primary mission is to eradicate blindness, transform disability, and, in turn, alleviate poverty in the region.

Presently, the Khyber Eye Foundation is actively engaged in several impactful projects, including:

• Daily examination of 250 to 300 patients in the Outpatient Department (OPD) and performing 40 to 45 cataract surgeries daily, all at no cost for Mustehkeen ZAKAT recipients.

• Organizing regular free eye camps in Peshawar and its surrounding areas, where essential medicines and eyeglasses are provided free of charge.

• Over its history, KEF Hospital has examined an astounding 970,255 patients in the OPD and performed 79,805 Cataract Surgeries, delivering life-changing outcomes since its inception.

• The Khyber Eye Foundation also champions the School Eye Health Program, sending project teams to various schools in Peshawar and its vicinity to assess students' refractive errors and supply them with much-needed eyeglasses.
The Khyber Eye Foundation's unwavering dedication and tireless efforts continue to illuminate the path toward a brighter and more hopeful future for those in need in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

Name: Henan Provincial Chest Hospital
Description:
Henan Provincial Chest Hospital (Affiliated Chest Hospital of Zhengzhou University) is a provincial tertiary Grade A hospital with a focus on medical treatment, teaching, research, prevention, rehabilitation, and cadres' health care. It specializes in the treatment of cardiovascular diseases and respiratory system diseases. The hospital serves as a master's degree training base and is recognized as a provincial civilized unit.

It is a national training base for interventional diagnosis and treatment of cardiovascular diseases, a sub-center of the Cardiovascular Disease Management Capability Evaluation and Enhancement Project (CDQI) in Henan, a national standardized heart failure center, chest pain center, atrial fibrillation center, and a national clinical trial institution for drugs. The hospital is also a sub-center of the National Clinical Research Center for Tuberculosis, Henan Provincial Diagnosis and Treatment Center for Major Vascular Diseases, Henan Provincial Mediastinoscopy Diagnosis and Treatment Center, Henan Provincial Structural Heart Disease Intervention Diagnosis and Treatment Engineering Technology Center, Henan Provincial Clinical Treatment Center for Tuberculosis, and Henan Provincial Clinical Quality Control Center for Tuberculosis. Additionally, it serves as the Henan base for the promotion of minimally invasive tumor techniques in county-level hospitals, a health care base for direct cadres, and the only hospital in Zhengzhou designated by the State Maritime Safety Administration for seafarer medical examinations.

The hospital was founded in 1978 as the Henan Provincial Tuberculosis Prevention and Treatment Research Institute. In 1989, it became the Henan Provincial Tuberculosis Hospital, renamed as Henan Provincial Pulmonary Hospital in 1993, and later changed to Henan Provincial Chest Hospital in 1995. In 2021, it became part of Zhengzhou University's affiliated hospital system.

Name: CREAMEDIC
Description:
Creatividad e Integración en Servicios Médicos (CREAMEDIC) es una empresa mexicana de Grupo CIE que ofrece soluciones integrales en infraestructura, operación y control de infecciones hospitalarias, con un enfoque de innovación, eficiencia y compromiso social.

Nuestro propósito es fortalecer el sistema de salud a través de proyectos que integran ingeniería, tecnología y experiencia operativa, garantizando espacios seguros, funcionales y sostenibles para la atención médica.

Nuestro origen se remonta a uno de los mayores desafíos sanitarios de nuestra historia. Durante la pandemia por COVID-19, participamos en la creación de la Unidad Temporal COVID-19 Centro Citibanamex, que atendió a más de 9,000 pacientes. Posteriormente, replicamos el modelo en distintas regiones del país con proyectos como el Hospital Temporal Autódromo Hermanos Rodríguez, CRIS Iztapalapa, CRIT Ciudad Nezahualcóyotl, Unidad “La Paz” y Unidad “Ciudad Valles”.

Lo que comenzó como una respuesta de emergencia se transformó en una visión a largo plazo: contribuir al fortalecimiento de la infraestructura y la operación hospitalaria en México. Con la experiencia adquirida y la solidez de nuestras alianzas estratégicas, consolidamos una estructura capaz de ofrecer soluciones que abarcan tres ejes fundamentales:

Infraestructura hospitalaria: diseño, adecuación, reconversión e implementación de unidades médicas, equipamiento y mantenimiento.

Operación hospitalaria: servicios integrales que garantizan el funcionamiento eficiente de las unidades de salud, desde alimentación y limpieza hasta traslado, vigilancia y gestión de insumos.

Control de infecciones: implementación de sistemas especializados como el Sistema Integral de Maceración Hospitalaria (SIMH), que reduce riesgos sanitarios y promueve entornos seguros.

En Creatividad e Integración en Servicios Médicos mantenemos un compromiso permanente con la innovación, la calidad y la salud.

Name: Beykoz Invesa Hayvan Hastanesi
Description:
Beykoz Hayvan Hastanesi olarak, sevimli dostlarınızın sağlığı ve refahı için kapsamlı veteriner hizmetleri sunuyoruz. Modern teknolojiyle donatılmış hastanemizde, alanında uzman veteriner hekimlerimizle evcil hayvanlarınızın her türlü sağlık ihtiyacını karşılamak için buradayız. Amacımız, hayvan dostlarımıza en iyi bakımı sunarak onların sağlıklı ve mutlu bir yaşam sürmelerini sağlamak.

Hizmetlerimiz arasında; genel sağlık kontrolleri, cerrahi müdahaleler, diş bakımı, görüntüleme ve laboratuvar hizmetleri, aşılar ve koruyucu sağlık hizmetleri yer almaktadır. Hayvan dostlarınız için en iyi bakım ve tedavi süreçlerini sunmak adına sürekli gelişen ve yenilenen bir yaklaşımı benimsiyoruz.

Misyonumuz, evcil hayvan sahiplerine güvenilir, samimi ve kaliteli veteriner hizmetleri sunarak onların en yakın dostlarına en iyi şekilde bakabilmelerini sağlamaktır. Beykoz Hayvan Hastanesi, sevgiyi ve uzmanlığı bir araya getirerek hayvan sağlığı konusunda fark yaratmayı hedeflemektedir.

Name: Dentistün Ağız ve Diş Sağlığı Merkezi
Description:
İstanbul Sağlık ve Teknoloji Üniversitesi DENTİSTÜN Ağız ve Diş Sağlığı Eğitim Uygulama ve Araştırma Merkezimiz sunduğu yüksek kaliteli sağlık hizmeti ile 2023 yılında sektördeki yerini almıştır.

İstanbul Avrupa yakasında yer alan; uzman hekimlerden oluşan kadrosu, 8.800 m2 kapalı alanda, son teknoloji cihazlarla donatılmış merkezimiz; hasta ve çalışan memnuniyetine özen gösteren, geleceğin sağlık merkezi modelini esas alarak hizmet sunmaktadır.

Ağız ve diş sağlığı konusunda tüm anabilim dallarında uzman diş hekimi bulunduran merkezimiz; genel anestezi ve sedasyon altında diş hekimi ile iletişim güçlüğü çeken kaygılı, çocuk veya yetişkin hasta tedavileri ve engelli bireylerde kişiye özgü tedavi planları ile ağız bölgesinin yanı sıra, bütüncül diş hekimliği kavramını benimseyerek ağız ve diş sağlığı ile bağlantılı; bireyin tüm sağlığını etkileyecek bireyin genel sağlığının iyileşmesine katkıda bulunmayı hedefleyen farklı tedavi konseptleri ile gelişmiş görüntüleme teknolojisi kullanılarak, ileri implant cerrahisi, ortognatik cerrahi, protez, diş eti tedavileri, ortodonti, kanal tedavileri, estetik dolgular ve gülüş tasarımın yanı sıra, spor diş hekimliğinde kişiye özgü tedavi yöntemleri ile hizmet vermektedir.

Merkezimizde 34 ünite, dijital görüntüleme sistemleri, genel anestezi ameliyathanesi ve merkezi sterilizasyon ünitesi bulunmaktadır. Çocuk hastalar için mevcut oyun alanı, çocuk hastaların tedavi işlemlerini desteklemektedir.

Merkezimiz, bir sağlık kurumu olmanın yanı sıra bir eğitim kurumudur. Bu nedenle bünyemizde bulunan akademisyen diş hekimlerinin önceliği lisans, yüksek lisans ve doktora öğrencilerine dünya standartların üzerinde eğitim imkânı sunarak; öğrencilere teorik eğitimler vermek ve onları pratik eğitimlerle destekleyip, klinik süreçlerdeki becerilerini geliştirmektir.

Name: EMOT HOSPITAL
Description:
EMOT Hospital is Turkey’s first specialized hospital focused on Hand Microsurgery, Orthopedic Surgery and Traumatology, delivering over 33 years of academic and clinical excellence in musculoskeletal care for local and international patients.

ORTHOPEDIC, SPINE & MICROSURGERY CARE
EMOT provides comprehensive treatment in Orthopedic Surgery, Hand Surgery, Microsurgery, Arthroscopy, Spine Surgery, Scoliosis Treatment, Sports Medicine, Complex Trauma, Peripheral Nerve Surgery, Brachial Plexus Surgery, Joint Preservation and Advanced Rehabilitation. All services are delivered under one roof through a multidisciplinary medical model.

MINIMALLY INVASIVE & EVIDENCE-BASED SURGERY
Our surgeons apply minimally invasive orthopedic and spine surgery techniques, supported by advanced diagnostic imaging and evidence-based treatment protocols to ensure accurate diagnosis, safe surgery and long-term functional recovery.

SPINE HEALTH & SCOLIOSIS TREATMENT
EMOT specializes in spine disorders including disc herniation, degenerative spine disease and adolescent and adult scoliosis, managed through coordinated orthopedic surgery, neurosurgery and rehabilitation planning.

REHABILITATION & INTERNATIONAL PATIENT SERVICES
Personalized physiotherapy and rehabilitation are integrated into every treatment plan. Our International Patient Services team supports patients from diagnosis to recovery, ensuring continuity of care, clear communication and patient safety.

Driven by academic medicine, ethical practice and patient-centered care, EMOT Hospital exists to restore mobility, function and quality of life through world-class orthopedic, spine and microsurgical treatment.

Name: Beijing DCN Orthopedic Hospital
Description:

The hospital has 170 inpatient beds, 5 operating rooms and 3 ICU beds. It employs over 400 full-time employees and 200 visiting specialists. It provides over 200,000 outpatient visits, 8,000 admissions, and over 10,000 surgeries per year.
To meet the overall needs of its patients, DCN Hospital also provides GP, dental, gastroenterology, dermatology and TCM services.
Since 2005, DCN has continuously provided medical support for all previous Summer and Winter Olympics. Nearly 20 doctors and rehabilitation therapists have been selected into the talent pool of the national team's medical staff, and have provided over 10,000 diagnosis and treatment services for national team athletes. From 2018 to 2022, it excellently completed the medical support tasks for the Beijing Winter Olympics and was awarded the honorary title of "Collective with Outstanding Contributions to the Beijing Winter Olympics and Paralympic Winter Games" by the CPC Central Committee and the State Council.

Who Benefits

Name: SRE ISWARIA FOUNDATION
Description:
Sri Iswaria Foundation is dedicated to creating an anemia-free nation by empowering underprivileged communities across India. Our mission is to drive transformative societal change through quality care, focusing on essential needs and enabling individuals to lead healthier, more fulfilling lives.

Core Focus Areas:
Anemia Free Nation: Conducting health camps, providing nutritional support, and running awareness campaigns to eliminate anemia nationwide.

Education Sponsorship: Offering financial assistance and resources to economically disadvantaged students, ensuring access to quality education.

Healthcare Initiatives: Organizing regular medical camps and outreach programs to address critical health issues and enhance community well-being.

Nutrition Programs: Implementing feeding initiatives and distributing essential food supplies to combat malnutrition and promote healthy development.

Environmental Care: Promoting sustainability through tree plantation drives, clean-up campaigns, and education on eco-friendly practices.

Sports Development: Encouraging physical fitness and teamwork by organizing sports events and providing necessary equipment.

Disaster Relief Efforts: Swiftly mobilizing resources during natural calamities to provide immediate assistance, including food, shelter, and medical aid.

Our Approach:
We adopt a holistic approach to community development, addressing interconnected issues such as anemia eradication, education, health, nutrition, and environmental sustainability. Our inclusive programs ensure marginalized populations receive the support needed to overcome barriers and achieve self-reliance.

Get Involved:
We invite individuals, organizations, and stakeholders to join us in driving positive change. Through volunteering, partnerships, or donations, your support can significantly impact the lives of those we serve. Together, we can build a more equitable and compassionate society.

For further information visit our website

Name: Hospital Hemmi
Description:
El 1 de marzo de 2019 marcó un antes y un después en la salud de la zona sur de Yapur Dumit con la apertura del Centro de Salud Hemmi. La iniciativa nació de la visión del Dr. José Paulino Reyes, quien desde 2010 identificó la falta de servicios médicos primarios de calidad en la comunidad.

Movido por este compromiso, ideó un centro que brindara atención médica oportuna, cercana y con altos estándares. Con el respaldo de un grupo de socios fundadores que compartían su visión, lo que comenzó como un centro de primer nivel evolucionó hasta convertirse en una institución de salud de tercer nivel.

Desde entonces, Hemmi ha sido un referente en la región, destacándose por su enfoque humano, su infraestructura moderna y su capacidad para ofrecer soluciones médicas integrales.

Hoy celebramos el impacto de una visión que se transformó en realidad: un centro que sigue creciendo y aportando al bienestar de quienes más lo necesitan.

Name: Oftal s.r.o.

Komplexnosť oftalmologickej starostlivosti doplňujú služby špecializovanej očnej optiky s poradňou pre slabozrakých a o zrak detí sa stará tím pleoptických a ortoptických sestier v Očnej škôlke v Banskej Bystrici. Znamená to, že sa na nás môžete obrátiť s akýmkoľvek problémom so zrakom a vieme Vám pomôcť. Podľa kvality a rozsahu oftalmologickej starostlivosti patrí naša nemocnica medzi špičkové oftalmologické centrá. V uplatňovaní jednodňovej zdravotnej starostlivosti, v uplatňovaní reformy lôžkovej starostlivosti, v operáciách katarakty, v diagnostike a liečbe retinálnych ochorení sme lídrom na Slovensku. Naši lekári sú renomovanými odbornými kapacitami na Slovensku a Európe.
